title: Amaro's Toolbox
description: A collection of texture packs that alter wood, stone, copper, iron, gold and diamond tools to reference the different wood types present in the game.
body:
This pack changes the texture of wooden, stone, copper, iron, golden and diamond tools to give them the color palettes reminicent of different wood types present in the game, similarly to netherite tools and their crimson wood handles.

It also gives spears smaller icons that better showcase the items, similar to the trident.

The pack changes each of the tiers in the following ways:
- **Wooden tools** have their blades and heads altered to color of oak wood, as a reference to it being the first wood type added to the game.
- **Stone tools** have their handles recolored to be reminiscent of jungle wood, in addition to having the outline of the stone hoe fixed.
- **Copper tools** have their handles recolored to be reminiscent of mangrove wood, in addition to brighter highlights to make them look shinier.
- **Iron tools** have their handles darkened to reference dark oak wood, in addition to having the outline of the iron hoe fixed.
- **Gold tools** get orange handles as a reference to acacia wood, in addition to having the shading of the blades and heads altered to make them look shinier.
- **Diamond tools** have their handles recolored to be reminiscent of spruce wood, in addition to having the shading of the blades and heads altered to make them look shinier.

**Pack Modifier**

This texture pack includes a modifier for "Copper Tool Oxidization" from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/), allowing you to utilize the style of copper items seen here alongside that pack.

**Extra Details**

- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required.
- Also check out [Amaro's Armory](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/amaros-armory) for altered armor sets.
